heading: Visiting Scholars Program
label: 4027 Visiting Scholars Program
notes: Amendments1994—Subsecs. (a), (c). substituted “institution” for “Foreign Service Institute” and “Institute” in subsec. (a) and “institution” for “Foreign Service Institute” in subsec. (c).Pub. L. 103–236
amendments: Amendments1994—Subsecs. (a), (c). substituted “institution” for “Foreign Service Institute” and “Institute” in subsec. (a) and “institution” for “Foreign Service Institute” in subsec. (c).Pub. L. 103–236

children.heading: Establishment of program
children.label: a Establishment of program
children.text: There is authorized to be established at the institution a program whereby selected scholars would participate fully in the educational and training activities of the institution. This program may be referred to as the “Visiting Scholars Program”.

children.heading: Selection and appointment of scholars
children.label: b Selection and appointment of scholars

children.text: Scholars participating in the Visiting Scholars Program shall be selected by a five-member board described in subsection (c).
Each visiting scholar shall serve a term of one year, except that such term may be extended for one additional one-year period.

children.heading: Establishment of selection board
children.label: c Establishment of selection board
children.text: The board referred to in subsection (b) shall be composed of the Director of the institution, who shall serve as chairperson, and four other members appointed by the Secretary of State.
